// note: Copy this file to .sdlc-stack.json at your project root and edit. The plugin reads it to resolve the skill registry and the active compliance regimes.
// stack note: Identifier of the stack profile to use. Determines which stack-specific skills (e.g. supabase-rls, lambda-worker) are 'active' for this project. Leave blank or omit if the project doesn't match a profile.
// overlay note: Optional project-specific skill overlay directory under skills/project/. Used for cross-cutting project conventions (RABOS-style). null or omitted = no overlay.
// compliance note: List the compliance regimes this project must satisfy. Known modules: gdpr, hipaa, soc2, pci-dss, eu-ai-act, wcag, accessibility-us, accessibility-eu. The plugin's compliance skills (sdlc-{module}-*.md) become 'active' for declared modules; others are out-of-scope but remain available.
